response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including roles involving C++ (e.g., at National Instruments), but his recent work has primarily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with limited current exposure to C++ and industrial automation. His expertise in cloud-native, event-driven systems and web/mobile development does not directly align with the on-premises/industrial automation focus. However, his strong engineering background and adaptability suggest potential fit with additional validation.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (e.g., NI LabWindows/CVI, low-latency apps with Dlang)
Proven track record in scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Experience with secure development practices (e.g., TDD, Pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant role in C++ was in 2015)
No clear experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
No demonstrated expertise in IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards or industrial SDL practices
